name: ReputationStacker
description:
What ReputationStacker Does

ReputationStacker is yet another handy tool that facilitates the process of generating online reviews for businesses across review sites. It automates sending review requests to customers and monitoring/managing the incoming feedback. The core value proposition is making the review acquisition and management process streamlined and hands-off through automations. While the primary focus appears to be on review-gen, it provides some additional monitoring and reporting capabilities as well.

‍

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Automated review request campaigns via email and text messaging
  • Single-question survey format to drive customers to leave reviews
  • Ability to direct customers to review on specific sites of importance
  • Automated reminders to increase response rates
  • Centralized dashboard to view and respond to reviews from multiple sources
  • Review management capabilities like responding, handling negative feedback
  • Options to share positive reviews on social media and website
  • Reporting and analytics on review volumes, sentiment, trends
  • Supports review generation for all industries/business types

Pricing

Offers custom prices for all services

Pros

✅Has a negative review filter option so all the new feedback first comes to you before it goes public

✅Enables businesses to create customer loyalty campaigns to reward regular customers and attract new ones.

✅Automation capabilities are great and save time for customers

Cons

❌There could be more customization options in the platform

❌Some customers report software to be slightly challenging to navigate
what_people_say:
‍

What customers say

“That it allows the customer to review our company without it going straight on a review platform so that we can filter the ones that were not completely satisfied and handle them accordingly.”

- Review collected by and hosted on Capterra

‍

“Initially, found the software a little difficult to navigate as a first time user.”

- Review collected by and hosted on Capterra
